description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named gcc that runs on push to feature/sanity-checks-for-github-ci and on pull requests to master. Use two jobs, build-gcc-cpp03-linux-STL and build-gcc-cpp03-linux-No-STL, each running on ubuntu-22.04, checking out the repository, then building with GCC C++03 using cmake with and without STL, and making the project.
